summary: Comprehensive testing of new Titelli Marketplace features: Subscriptions system (10 plans + 14 add-ons), IA/Marketing sections, multi-step registration, and enterprise profile with performance indicators. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend fully functional.

issues: Enterprise page URL uses UUID instead of slug - /entreprise/b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819 works but /entreprise/spa-luxury-lausanne returns 404

action_items: Consider adding slug-based routing for enterprise pages for better SEO and user-friendly URLs
critical_code_review_comments: IA/Marketing sections (IAClientsSection, InfluencersSection, InvitationsSection) use MOCKED data - no backend API integration
EnterpriseDashboard.js is very large (3500+ lines) - consider splitting into smaller components
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: Subscriptions (4 tabs with 10 plans + 14 add-ons), IA Ciblage clients, Influenceurs, Invitations clients, Publicités, Geste commercial, Multi-step registration with password strength indicator, Enterprise profile with performance indicators and display variant toggle. IA/Marketing sections use MOCKED data locally.

features_tested.homepage: ✓ Navigation and display correct - 6/6 sections found
features_tested.registration: ✓ Multi-step form (Client/Entreprise) with password strength indicator
features_tested.subscriptions_section: ✓ 4 tabs working (Forfaits base, Premium, Optimisation, Options à la carte)
features_tested.ia_ciblage_clients: ✓ Section found with 'Nouveau ciblage' button (MOCKED data)
features_tested.influenceurs: ✓ Section found with 9 influencer cards (MOCKED data)
features_tested.invitations_clients: ✓ Section found with 'Nouvelle invitation' button (MOCKED data)
features_tested.enterprise_profile: ✓ Performance indicators (6 metrics) and display variant toggle working

mocked_apis_note: IA/Marketing sections (IAClientsSection, InfluencersSection, InvitationsSection) use locally mocked data - no dedicated backend API for these features
